title: Wget Download Request
description: Schema representing a GNU Wget file download request configuration, covering URL, protocol options, authentication, output, and recursive download settings.

url.description: The URL of the resource to download. Supports http://, https://, ftp://, and ftps:// schemes.

outputDocument.description: Path to save the downloaded file. Use '-' to write to stdout.

outputDirectory.description: Directory in which to save downloaded files.

recursive.description: Enable recursive downloading of linked pages and files.

level.description: Maximum depth for recursive downloading. 0 means infinite.

resume.description: Resume a partially downloaded file using HTTP REST and RANGE headers.

mirror.description: Enable site mirroring: turns on recursion, timestamping, and infinite recursion depth.

timestamping.description: Only download files newer than local copies using If-Modified-Since headers.

noParentDirectories.description: Do not ascend to parent directories when retrieving recursively.

convertLinks.description: Convert absolute links in downloaded HTML to relative links for local viewing.

noProxy.description: Comma-separated list of hosts to bypass the proxy.

loadCookies.description: Path to a file containing cookies in Netscape format to load before download.

saveCookies.description: Path to a file to save cookies to after download.

keepSessionCookies.description: Keep session (non-persistent) cookies when saving to file.

retries.description: Number of retries on transient download failures. 0 means infinite.

waitSeconds.description: Seconds to wait between retrieval requests.

timeout.description: Timeout in seconds for DNS, connect, and read operations.

userAgent.description: Custom User-Agent header string to send with HTTP requests.

acceptList.description: List of file extensions or MIME types to accept during recursive download.

rejectList.description: List of file extensions or MIME types to reject during recursive download.

domains.description: Comma-separated list of allowed domains for recursive download.

excludeDirs.description: List of directories to exclude from recursive download.

background.description: Run Wget in background and write output to wget-log.

verbose.description: Enable verbose output with full server response headers.

inputFile.description: Path to a file containing URLs to download, one per line.
